results.question: Create a calculated column for asset propagation risk score that combines propagation_class impact and bastion device status and add it to the dev assets table
results.sql: SELECT d.*, ( SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND code = d.propagation_class) * (CASE WHEN d.is_bastion_device THEN 1.3 ELSE 1 END) AS propagation_risk_score FROM dev_assets AS d;

calculation_steps.description: Determine the numeric score for the classified propagation class.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: SELECT numeric_score FROM risk_impact_metadata WHERE enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND code = propagation_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate the final propagation risk score considering bastion device status.
calculation_steps.sql_expression: propagation_risk_score = propagation_class_score * (CASE WHEN is_bastion_device THEN 1.3 ELSE 1 END)

results.description: CALCULATED_COLUMN: Raw impact score calculation using impact_class and classification metadata
results.question: Calculate the raw_impact score for each asset based on impact_class and asset classification criticality scores
results.sql: SELECT a.dev_id, (rim_impact.impact_class_score * 0.7 + rim_propagation.propagation_class_score * 0.3) AS raw_impact FROM assets a LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_impact ON rim_impact.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND rim_impact.code = (CASE WHEN a.criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN a.criticality_score >= 70 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END) LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_propagation ON rim_propagation.enum_type = 'propagation_class' AND rim_propagation.code = (CASE WHEN a.is_bastion_device = TRUE THEN 'Perimeter' ELSE 'Core' END);

calculation_steps.description: Classify asset impact class based on criticality scores
calculation_steps.sql_expression: CASE WHEN criticality_score >= 90 THEN 'Mission Critical' WHEN criticality_score >= 70 THEN 'Critical' ELSE 'Other' END AS impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Retrieve numeric scores for impact class from risk_impact_metadata
calculation_steps.sql_expression: LEFT JOIN risk_impact_metadata rim_impact ON rim_impact.enum_type = 'impact_class' AND rim_impact.code = impact_class

calculation_steps.description: Calculate raw impact score based on retrieved impact class scores
